title: Flock Coordination hotfix
summary: Forge v2 adds multi-agent coordination for human and agent fleets, with lane claims, version-checked state writes, request queues, safer handoffs, and a hotfix for agent identity threading.
highlights: Lane claims with TTL help multiple agents avoid editing the same work area at the same time.
Fleet-mode handoffs and checkpoints are append-only by default instead of clobbering shared state.
Requests queue and version-checked transitions let a driver agent apply worker updates deliberately.
`forge-commit` stages only files in claimed lanes to reduce accidental cross-agent commits.
Hotfix: fleet-mode `handoff` and `checkpoint` now preserve the real `agent_id` instead of recording `default`.
